hero.title: Take Control of Your Finances
hero.subtitle: Track your income, manage expenses, and reach your financial goals with Floussy — the app built for you.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to manage your money every day, with ease

tracking.title: Income & Expense Tracking
tracking.description: Easily record and categorize all your financial transactions in real time

goals.title: Savings Goals
goals.description: Set personalized financial goals and track your progress month by month

budgets.title: Budget Management
budgets.description: Create budgets by category and get smart alerts when you overspend

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.description: Visualize your financial habits with detailed and interactive charts

multicurrency.title: Multi-Currency
multicurrency.description: Manage your finances in MAD, EUR, USD, and more with automatic conversion

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.description: Never miss a payment deadline again with personalized notifications

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to take control of your money

step1.title: Create Your Account
step1.description: Sign up for free in seconds and set up your financial profile

step2.title: Add Your Transactions
step2.description: Record your income and expenses manually or connect your accounts

step3.title: Analyze & Optimize
step3.description: Check your reports, set goals, and improve your financial health

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Discover how Floussy helps thousands of people manage their money

review1.text: Floussy completely changed how I manage my money. The interface is intuitive and the reports are very detailed.
review1.name: Youssef B.

review2.text: Finally a finance app that understands the Moroccan market. MAD tracking and multi-currency are perfect.
review2.name: Fatima Z.

review3.text: Thanks to savings goals, I managed to save for my project in 6 months. Highly recommended!
review3.name: Ahmed M.

about.title: About Floussy
about.description: Floussy is a personal finance management app designed for employees, freelancers, and business owners in Morocco and beyond. Our mission is to make money management simple, intuitive, and accessible to everyone.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: We believe every person deserves quality financial tools, regardless of their income level. Floussy was born from this conviction — an app designed for the Moroccan and francophone market.
mission.p2: Our team works every day to provide you with the best possible experience, with innovative features and a polished interface.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide every decision we make

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: A clean and intuitive interface, without unnecessary complexity

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: No hidden fees, no surprises. Your trust is our priority

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Available in French, English, and Arabic, on all your devices

community.title: Community
community.description: Built with and for our community of users

team.title: A Passionate Team
team.description: We are a team of developers, designers, and financial experts based in Morocco, united by the desire to democratize personal financial management.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: A question, a suggestion, or a partnership? We're here to listen

form.heading: Send Us a Message
form.description: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

faq.title: Need Quick Help?
faq.description: Check out our help center to find answers to frequently asked questions about using Floussy.
